title: Chytroma holcogyne
taxonomy: Chytroma holcogyne is classified within the family Chytromidae, which is a group of beetles. Chytroma holcogyne is specifically placed in the subfamily Chytrominae. The genus Chytroma is part of the order Coleoptera. Chytroma holcogyne is further categorized as a species within the genus Chytroma. The classification of Chytroma holcogyne reflects its unique characteristics and relationships with other beetles.
